title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Digital

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Digital
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
